Title: Coletti, Luigi
Overview: Giotto scholar; notes about Coletti's opinions appear in Richard Offner's annotated catalog of the 1937 Mostra Giottesca.
Sources: Ladis, Andrew. "The Unmaking of a Connoisseur." in, Offner, Richard. A Discerning Eye: Essays on Early Italian Painting. University Park, PA: Pennsylvania State University Press, 1998, p,19, note 1;
